ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the individual in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the individual in kg */,
  "number_of_siblings" INTEGER /* Number of siblings the individual has */,
  "dominant_hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the individual */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest education level attained */,
  "only_child" TEXT /* Indicates if the individual is an only child */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation of the individual */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the individual */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the individual's residence */,
  "geographical_region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the individual's residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "psychological_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each psychological metric entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual the metrics belong to */,
  "fear_score" INTEGER /* Fear score of the individual */,
  "religiosity_score" INTEGER /* Religiosity score of the individual */,
  "happiness_score" INTEGER /* Happiness score of the individual */,
  "anxiety_score" INTEGER /* Anxiety score of the individual */,
  "depression_score" INTEGER /* Depression score of the individual */,
  "stress_score" INTEGER /* Stress score of the individual */,
  "selfesteem_score" INTEGER /* Self-esteem score of the individual */,
  "resilience_score" INTEGER /* Resilience score of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_psychological_metrics_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_choices" (
  "choice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle choice entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual the choices belong to */,
  "smoking" TEXT /* Smoking habits of the individual */,
  "alcohol" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the individual */,
  "healthy_lifestyle" TEXT /* Indicates if the individual lives a healthy lifestyle */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the individual */,
  "exercise_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of exercise */,
  "sleep_hours" REAL /* Average number of hours the individual sleeps per night */,
  "screen_time" REAL /* Average daily screen time (in hours) */,
  "social_media_usage" TEXT /* Frequency of social media usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_choices_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "music_preferences" (
  "music_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each music preference entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual the preferences belong to */,
  "like_music" TEXT /* Indicates if the individual likes music */,
  "music_diversity_score" INTEGER /* Diversity score of the individual's music taste */,
  "favorite_genre" TEXT /* Favorite music genre */,
  "playlist_diversity" INTEGER /* Diversity score of the individual's music playlist */,
  "music_streaming_service" TEXT /* Music streaming service used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("music_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_music_preferences_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "punctuality_scores" (
  "punctuality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each punctuality score entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual the scores belong to */,
  "punctuality" TEXT /* Description of the individual's punctuality habits */,
  "lying" TEXT /* Description of the individual's lying habits */,
  "responsibility_score" INTEGER /* Responsibility score of the individual */,
  "organization_score" INTEGER /* Organization score of the individual */,
  "time_management_score" INTEGER /* Time management score of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("punctuality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_punctuality_scores_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_structure" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family structure entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual the structure belongs to */,
  "family_structure_details" TEXT /* Description of the individual's family structure */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the family */,
  "family_type" TEXT /* Type of family (e.g., nuclear, extended) */,
  "living_arrangement" TEXT /* Living arrangement (e.g., alone, with parents, with partner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_structure_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment */,
  "assessment_location" TEXT /* Location where the assessment was conducted */,
  "assessment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the assessment */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "table_accessed" TEXT /* Name of the table accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., technical, user experience) */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, reviewed, resolved) */,
  "suggested_improvements" TEXT /* Suggested improvements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
